div.h1: Sideview's "Canary" app is required but missing.
div.p: To run this app, you need to first install the Canary app. Canary is free to use and available on Splunkbase. It runs on both Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud, and can be installed using Splunk's in-product app install.
HOWEVER, if you missed that critical part, you may have missed some other details:

ol.li: This app has setup documentation on our website, the bulk of which points you to an additional TA developed by Cisco/Splunk to ingest the Webex CDR.

This app exists really to serve as a sort of adapter that allows the Cisco TA's data to be pulled into Sideview's main app Cisco CDR Reporting and Analytics. If you aren't familiar with Sideview's Cisco CDR app already, it is available as a free trial and the full setup documentation is here.

div.p: Please contact Sideview with any questions. We'd love to hear from you.
Unfortunately your version of Splunk appears to be prior to version 7.0 and the Canary will not run on these systems.

Especially if you're a current customer of Splunk, it is absolutely possible to upgrade Splunk to a more recent version. If you've been holding off because of particular concerns, reach out to us (or to Splunk) and it's likely we can help.

In the meantime here are some great docs for what particular upgrade paths that can get old releases all the way to the latest-and-greatest: https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Installation/HowtoupgradeSplunk
